summary: Plan-only classification for five open PR inventory items using the provided preflight artifact as live state. No GitHub mutations are recommended because close/comment actions are blocked, and no PR has complete merge preflight proof.

actions.reason: Broad feature PR with failed proof and incomplete review-bot resolution needs maintainer judgment before repair or merge.
Independent low-signal docs PR; do not merge without required preflight, and do not close because close actions are blocked and low-signal closeout is disabled.
Dependency bump is narrow and repairable, but failed Android tests block merge; create a replacement repair path rather than merging the failing Dependabot branch.
Build an executable narrow fix artifact for a replacement PR that reproduces and repairs the Android test failures before updating the dependency.
Focused contributor PR is worth repairing, but failing checks and missing review-bot resolution block merge.
Emit a concrete repair artifact so the contributor branch can be made merge-ready while preserving author credit.
Android minSdk policy and compatibility audit scope need maintainer judgment before any repair or replacement PR.

needs_human: #41892: broad XL feature with failed proof and unresolved automated-review evidence; maintainer should decide whether to continue, split, or close outside this blocked-close plan.
#49488: maintainer-requested Android API 26-30 compatibility audit and minSdk product decision remain unresolved.

repair_candidate.summary: Two narrow repair paths are recommended: repair #48942 in the contributor branch after resolving failed checks and review-bot findings, and replace the uneditable Dependabot branch for #92125 only after reproducing/fixing Android test failures. #41892 and #49488 require maintainer decisions; #78715 is kept independent with no mutation.
repair_candidate.pr_title: Repair merge-ready PR inventory shard 128 narrow candidates
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair the narrow merge candidates from live-pr-inventory-20260617T015524-128.

Scope:
- Repair #48942 on the contributor branch if possible, keeping the session-title extraction and explicit label precedence behavior intact.
- For #92125, reproduce the Android test failures from the OkHttp/mockwebserver bump and open a replacement branch only if the fix remains limited to the dependency update and required Android test adjustments.

Credit:
- Source PR #48942 by @JFWaskin must be credited in commit/PR notes.
- Source PR #92125 by Dependabot must be referenced as the dependency update source.

Validation:
- pnpm check:changed
- pnpm test src/gateway/session-title.test.ts src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts
- ./gradlew -p apps/android testPlayDebugUnitTest testThirdPartyDebugUnitTest
- ./gradlew -p apps/android assemblePlayDebug
- Codex /review before any merge recommendation.
credit_notes: Preserve author credit for #48942: Thanks @JFWaskin / source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/48942.
Preserve source PR attribution for #92125: Dependabot source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/92125.
needs_human: #41892: broad XL feature with failed proof and unresolved automated-review evidence; maintainer should decide whether to continue, split, or close outside this blocked-close plan.
#49488: maintainer-requested Android API 26-30 compatibility audit and minSdk product decision remain unresolved.
